action_set_definitions.name: get_ledger_balances
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current numerical balances for specific account codes from the General Ledger for a given subsidiary and period.

subsidiary.description: The name or ID of the subsidiary (e.g., 'NordicSub').

account_codes.description: List of account codes to query (e.g., ['Total_Equity', 'Net_Income', 'NCI_Balance', 'CTA_Account']).

action_set_definitions.name: get_exchange_rates
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the opening, closing, and average exchange rates for a specific currency pair and period.

action_set_definitions.name: get_reconciliation_status
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the reconciliation tracking object to identify pending discrepancies and current status for a subsidiary.

action_set_definitions.name: post_adjustment_journal
action_set_definitions.description: Creates a journal entry to adjust ledger balances and fix reconciliation discrepancies.

amount.description: The adjustment amount (positive for debit, negative for credit, based on standard accounting rules).

action_set_definitions.name: update_reconciliation_record
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the status of a specific reconciliation issue to 'matched' or 'resolved'.

issue_id.description: The ID of the discrepancy to update.

state_description.ledger_balances: A map of account codes to their current numerical balances in the General Ledger.
state_description.sub_ledger_entries: A list of detailed transaction records from sub-ledgers or bank statements to be reconciled.
state_description.reconciliation_status: Tracking object showing which transactions are 'matched', 'pending', or 'flagged_discrepancy'.
state_description.is_period_closed: Indicates if the current period is locked for editing.

discrepancies.description: NCI balance at consolidated level does not match NCI share of Net Assets + CTA movement.
